creator: matt@tnpi.net
text: I just experienced this as well. It was on a system I just upgraded from 9.3 -> 10.1-RELEASE via the "make world" dance (because of bug #195484 in freebsd-update). Installing the 10.1 kernel and reboot worked fine. Then I installed world, mergemaster, deleted old libs, and finally ran freebsd-update to install the latest security patches. Then it hung on reboot. Ouch.
